violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license. Application provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
The handwashing sinks in the main kitchen and in meat cutting room are lacking notification signage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Caramelized onions and housemade relish were observed held past 7 days. Foods were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
The walls near the 3 bay sink in meat cutting room and the coving in the meat cutting room were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Lightbulbs under the kitchen hood were observed missing and/or nonfunctional during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
